name: Sooz's Hamburger Hash
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook the hamburger over medium heat until browned.
2. Add onion, bell pepper, and garlic to the skillet. Cook until the vegetables are softened.
3. Stir in salt and pepper to taste.
4. Add the diced potatoes to the skillet and mix well with the other ingredients.
5. Continue cooking over medium heat until the potatoes are tender and fully cooked through, about 20-25 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and serve hot.
